customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety present. Jeff is a self-motivated inbound buyer with a specific aesthetic vision. His engagement is high but conditional on the product matching his expectation (black panels, Tesla-associated). He is cooperative, direct, and not price-sensitive in his framing — his stated motivation is design coherence, not bill savings.
unresolved_concerns: Jeff's primary motivation is black Tesla-branded panels to match a house being painted black — Ion sells its own panels, not Tesla's. Whether Ion's panels satisfy this aesthetic expectation is unresolved and must be addressed early in the closer call before the proposal is presented.

Bill has not been received. Jeff hedged at 04:01 ('I'll see what I can do') after hitting navigation friction on the utility portal. The closer should confirm bill receipt before the call or be prepared to collect verbally.
sensitive_topics_raised: Tesla product expectation — Jeff explicitly asked about 'the Tesla ones' and described wanting black panels. The closer must not allow Jeff to proceed through the full proposal under the assumption that he is getting Tesla-branded solar panels.
exact_promises_rep_made: Nica will send a text from her work cell for Jeff to reply with his kilowatt usage.
The design will be built from Jeff's kilowatt usage data.
closer_should_know: Jeff's wife is on the title and was not included in the appointment — she is a required decision-maker who is currently absent from the booking.
